name: Two Toners
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butterscotch chips and 1 tablespoon of oil in a double boiler over hot, not boiling water. Stir in the chopped walnuts.
2. Pour the mixture into a pan and arrange one layer of mini-marshmallows on top.
3. Melt the chocolate chips and 1 tablespoon of oil in a double boiler over hot, not boiling water.
4. Pour the melted chocolate over the marshmallows.
5. Chill until set.
6. Use a hammer and chisel to cut into pieces.
From: Syd's Cookbook.
